title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 23
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students arranging a drama rehearsal.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still meeting in the main hall for the drama rehearsal this afternoon? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Man: That was the original plan, but the main hall is being used for an assembly. [1]We have to meet in the music room instead[/1].. || Woman: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the classroom? || Man: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where is the rehearsal today?
items.explanation: The rehearsal will be in the music room.

items.context: You hear two students preparing for a cookery class.
items.audio_script: Man: Have you packed for the cookery class tomorrow yet? I put a recipe book in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Woman: That was mentioned earlier, but the teacher provides recipes and equipment, but we must protect our clothes. [1]You need to bring an apron instead[/1].. || Man: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a saucepan as well? || Woman: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The student should bring an apron.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for Sunday.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still going to go to the cinema this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Boy: That was our first plan, but the film is sold out and the tennis courts are wet. We also thought about whether to play tennis. || Girl: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Boy: [1]We are going to visit the wildlife park instead[/1].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Girl: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They choose to visit a wildlife park.

items.context: You hear two students talking about a dentist appointment.
items.audio_script: Boy: I need to check the time for the dentist appointment. I wrote down eleven o'clock, but I am not sure it is correct. || Girl: It changed this morning because the dentist is running later than expected this morning. [1]The appointment is at half past eleven now[/1]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Boy: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Girl: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time is the appointment?
items.explanation: The appointment is at half past eleven.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about headphones.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting on with your headphones? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Man: I first thought the cable had broken, and my brother wondered whether the volume was too low. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [1]They will not connect to my phone at all[/1].. || Woman: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it for the language lesson tomorrow. || Man: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the headphones?
items.explanation: The headphones will not connect to the phone.

items.context: You hear two friends arranging travel to a football match.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the football stadium? I thought you were planning to travel by train. || Woman: I was, but the train is cancelled and parking at the stadium is impossible. I also considered going by car. [1]I am going by bus instead[/1].. || Man: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Woman: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Man: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will the speaker get to the match?
items.explanation: The speaker will go by bus.

items.context: You hear two friends ordering lunch.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you chosen what to order? The queue is moving quickly, and we need to leave soon. || Boy: I nearly chose a tuna sandwich, and I also looked at tomato soup, but the sandwich has mayonnaise and I had soup yesterday. || Girl: So what are you going to have? I need to choose mine before we reach the counter. || Boy: [1]I am ordering the vegetable pasta[/1].. It should be enough for me, and then we can find somewhere quiet to sit before we go.
items.question: What will the speaker order?
